## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check pole_position polepos` is clean
- [ ] `ruff format pole_position polepos` is clean
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Docs updated where user-facing behavior changed (`docs/`, README)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
